scripts.build: node scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run typecheck && node scripts/run-pnpm.cjs --filter @workspace/negis run build
scripts.build:all: node scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run typecheck && node scripts/run-pnpm.cjs -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: node scripts/run-pnpm.cjs run typecheck:libs && node scripts/run-pnpm.cjs -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
